title: Make SARIF filenames match resolved suite profile
description: Use profile-aware SARIF filenames (<lang>-<profile>.sarif) and update report-only and cleanup logic to handle security-and-quality/code-quality reports accurately.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing profile-aware report paths and summary parsing: write <lang>-<profile>.sarif, make report-only language filtering profile-agnostic, and clean profile variants per language.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented profile-aware SARIF naming and parsing. Reports now use <lang>-<profile>.sarif; report-only language filter supports security-and-quality and code-quality names; cleanup removes targeted language report variants. Validation: targeted tests (25 passed), full pytest (128 passed), make check, and Biblicus rcql now outputs *-security-and-quality.sarif paths for python/actions/javascript-typescript.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Shipped in commit c90f30f on develop. SARIF output files now include resolved suite profile in filename and report-only/cleanup logic support profile-aware names.
